metadata.reference: L. V. Rodríguez-de Marcos, J. I. Larruquert, J. A. Méndez, J. A. Aznárez. Self-consistent optical constants of MgF2, LaF3, and CeF3 films. Opt. Mater. Express 7, 989-1006 (2017) (Numerical data kindly provided by Juan Larruquert)
metadata.comments: 44 nm film prepared by evaporation from tungsten boat at 250 °C
